{{Infobox technique
| name = Reader senses
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] possess extended awareness through [[Reader senses]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Active Reading]] requires a deep, thorough understanding of the target.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Active Reading]] typically works on creations that have a certain amount of [[Intent]] invested in them.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The impact of the green light blinds [[Calder]]'s [[Reader senses]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
